style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;gradientColor=light-dark(#000000,#34A853);" value="<div><font style="font-size: 17px;"><b>Subnet (Regional)</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 14px;">(us-east1)</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="204" x="359" y="292" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0j4nBRwaFd8FbshdgL0-9" parent="1" style="font-size: 14px;">10.10.0.2</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="63" width="204" x="212" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0j4nBRwaFd8FbshdgL0-14" parent="1" IP&nbsp;</b>(Optional)</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 14px;">34.x.x.x</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="204" x="514" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0j4nBRwaFd8FbshdgL0-15" parent="1" style="strokeWidth=2;html=1;shape=mxgraph.flowchart.annotation_2;align=left;labelPosition=right;pointerEvents=1;rotation=90;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="296" width="50" x="438" y="318" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0j4nBRwaFd8FbshdgL0-16" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;fillColor=#f5f5f5;gradientColor=#b3b3b3;strokeColor=#666666;" value="<div align="left">&nbsp; Legend</div><div align="left"><br></div><div align="left">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Gray&nbsp; &nbsp;=&nbsp; Resource Organization<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Blue&nbsp; &nbsp;=&nbsp; Global Network<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; Green&nbsp; =&nbsp; Regional Network Segment<br>&nbsp; &nbsp;Orange =&nbsp; Compute Resource<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Purple =&nbsp; Connectivity</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="131" width="230" x="89" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0j4nBRwaFd8FbshdgL0-17" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;fillColor=#f5f5f5;gradientColor=#b3b3b3;strokeColor=#666666;" value="<div align="left"><font style="font-size: 14px;">&nbsp; Key Concept:</font></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 14px;"><u><br></u>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<u>Projects contain VPC Networks.<br></u>&nbsp; &nbsp;<u>VPC Networks contain Subnets.<br></u>&nbsp; &nbsp;<u>Subnets contain VM IP addresses.<br></u>&nbsp; &nbsp;<u>VPC Networks are global.<br></u>&nbsp; &nbsp;<u>Subnets are regional.</u></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="141" width="253" x="333.5" y="577" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P0j4nBRwaFd8FbshdgL0-18" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 29px;"><b><font>Project Network Subnet Hierarchy</font></b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="53" width="537" x="157" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Gray = Resource Organization
Blue = Global Network
Green = Regional Network Segment
Orange = Compute Resource
Purple = Connectivity
